name: AKM Industrial Company Limited
summary: AKM Industrial Company Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells flexible printed circuits (FPC), flexible packaging substrates, and related components in the People's Republic of China, Hong Kong, and internationally. The company also sources and sells electronic components, raw materials, and equipment; trades in FPCs and related products; and develops new energy car electronics module products. It provides its products to manufacturers of wearable products, optical camera modules, and display modules. The company was incorporated in 1993 and is based in Guangzhou, the People's Republic of China.
